creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the VPN tunnel was created

detailed_status.description: Current operational status of the VPN tunnel for troubleshooting

effective_labels.description: Computed labels applied to the VPN tunnel for organizational purposes

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the VPN tunnel in configurations

label_fingerprint.description: Hash of labels used to detect changes for updates

self_link.description: URL for accessing the VPN tunnel resource via the API

shared_secret_hash.description: Hash of the shared secret for secure VPN tunnel authentication

terraform_labels.description: Labels explicitly defined in Terraform for resource management

tunnel_id.description: Unique internal identifier for the VPN tunnel in GCP
